channel.title: Frontion — Geopolitical News Headlines
channel.description: Curated breaking geopolitical headlines from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drone strike halts operations at Moscow oil refinery
item.description: A Ukrainian drone attack sparked a fire and halted operations at the largest fuel supplier to the Moscow region, marking a significant escalation in Ukrainian strikes deep inside Russian territory amid the G7 summit.

item.title: ⚽ Iran World Cup team ordered out of US after opening match
item.description: Iran's coach says the team was ordered to leave the United States and return to its training base in Mexico after a 2-2 draw with New Zealand, highlighting how geopolitical tensions are spilling into the World Cup.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Trump says US will soon reimpose sanctions on Russian oil at G7
item.description: At the G7 summit in France, President Trump indicated the US would soon be able to reimpose sanctions on Russian oil, as leaders refocused attention on Ukraine alongside the Iran deal discussions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump tells G7 next phase of Iran deal will be easier as he meets Zelenskyy
item.description: President Trump expressed optimism about the next phase of the US-Iran deal while meeting with fellow G7 leaders and Ukrainian President Zelenskyy, who is pushing to keep Western focus on Russia's war.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran says final nuclear deal talks with US to begin this week
item.description: Iran announced that negotiations on a comprehensive nuclear agreement and sanctions relief with the United States would likely begin later this week, following the memorandum of understanding signed to end the war.

item.title: 🛢️ Energy firms brace for new era despite Hormuz reopening deal
item.description: Oil and gas majors expect a quick reopening of the Strait of Hormuz but warn that a full return to normal for the Gulf energy industry is unlikely after more than three months of disrupted shipping.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada announces new Russia sanctions after Carney-Zelensky G7 meeting
item.description: Canada unveiled a new sanctions package targeting 162 individuals, entities, and vessels linked to Russia’s shadow fleet and energy sector following a meeting between PM Carney and Zelensky at the G7 summit.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine to create new drone units to bolster northern border defenses
item.description: Commander-in-chief Syrskyi announced Ukraine will form new drone units to strengthen defenses along the northern border with Russia and Belarus amid ongoing security concerns.

item.title: ⚠️🛢️ US-Iran deal promises end to war but implementation remains unclear
item.description: Doubts swirled around the US-Iran agreement as questions persist about enforcement mechanisms, with shipping traffic and energy exports expected to take weeks to recover through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇸🔒 FBI disrupts planned attacks targeting White House UFC event, multiple arrests made
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel announced that law enforcement disrupted planned attacks targeting the UFC Freedom 250 event at the White House, with at least five people arrested in connection with an alleged drone-explosive plot.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇺🇸 Trump hints at renewed Ukraine focus, says Iran moving to rear-view mirror
item.description: After a very good meeting with Zelenskyy at the G7, Trump said Russia should make a deal and suggested Ukraine was moving back up his priority list as the Iran conflict recedes.

item.title: 🇺🇦 G7 allies scramble to put Ukraine back atop Trump agenda as war drags on
item.description: At the G7 summit in Evian, European leaders are working to refocus Trump on Ukraine after the US-Iran deal dominated early talks. Zelensky met Trump for over an hour as Kyiv pushes for stronger Western commitment.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇬🇧 France and Britain push multinational Hormuz naval mission as ceasefire nears
item.description: France and Britain are advancing plans for a coalition naval mission to safeguard Strait of Hormuz shipping if the US-Iran ceasefire holds, though Irans willingness to accept such an operation remains uncertain.

item.title: 🎣 Macron and Zelenskyy caught on camera game-planning how to handle Trump at G7
item.description: Footage captured the French president and Ukrainian leader strategizing together before meeting Trump at the G7 summit, highlighting European concerns about Trumps shifting priorities after the Iran deal.

item.title: 💥 Ukraine drone strike hits Moscow oil plant as G7 leaders convene
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck one of Moscows largest oil refineries just miles from the Kremlin, escalating Kyivs campaign against Russian energy infrastructure on the same day G7 leaders discussed the war in France.

item.title: 🛡️ Oil spot premiums fall to pre-war levels after US-Iran deal, shipping caution remains
item.description: Asian crude spot premiums have dropped back to levels seen before the US-Iran war following the tentative ceasefire deal, though uncertainty about how quickly normal Hormuz shipping can resume is keeping a floor under prices.

item.title: 🛢️⚓ Hormuz mine-clearing could delay full shipping return by 40–50 days
item.description: Demining operations involving conventional minesweepers and underwater drones may take 40–50 days before insurers and shipping companies feel confident enough to resume normal traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇫🇷⚖️ France to try 14 over Channel disaster that left 27 Iraqi Kurdish migrants dead
item.description: Fourteen people face trial in France over the deaths of at least 27 migrants in the November 2021 English Channel sinking — the deadliest recorded crossing disaster — in a case that could reshape people-smuggling prosecution across Europe.

item.title: 🇨🇩🦠 Red Cross warns Congo Ebola epidemic yet to peak, may last a year
item.description: A Red Cross official warned that the Ebola epidemic in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo has not yet peaked and could persist for a year, deepening the humanitarian crisis in the conflict-ridden region.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Trump warns Netanyahu to be 'more responsible' as US-Israel rift deepens over Iran deal
item.description: President Trump publicly rebuked Netanyahu, saying Israel must act more responsibly regarding Lebanon and Hezbollah, as the US-Israel rift over the Iran agreement widens and Iran demands Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon.

item.title: 🏛️💰 New Fed Chair Warsh faces hawkish shift as first meeting looms
item.description: Kevin Warsh convenes his first Federal Reserve meeting with rate hike expectations rising and the dot plot expected to show a hawkish shift, just weeks after replacing Jerome Powell.

item.title: ⚔️🇱🇧 Israel Lebanon stance threatens to unravel US-Iran agreement
item.description: The US-Iran ceasefire deal hinges on Israel accepting a ceasefire in Lebanon, something it is reluctant to do, creating a key obstacle as mediators try to finalize terms this week.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Japan PM Takaichi pushes coordinated G7 response to China trade tactics
item.description: At the G7 summit, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi urged allies to develop a united front against Beijing's use of export controls and trade leverage, signaling rising concern over China Shock 2.0.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky, Trump, Macron Hold Behind-the-Scenes Meeting at G7 Summit
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelensky met face-to-face with Trump and Macron on the sidelines of the G7 summit in Evian, their first encounter in nearly four months, as Kyiv pushes to revive peace negotiations.

item.title: 🇦🇺 US Military Plans Permanent War-Ready Weapons Stockpile in Australia
item.description: The US military is planning a permanent war-ready weapons stockpile for its Marine Corps on Australias southeast coast, positioned beyond the range of most Chinese missiles, according to tender documents and officials.
